intro: A playground of interactive things I build.

hero.tagline: Frontend engineer working at the seams of frameworks.

techStack.prompt: pick a tech to see how it shows up in my work →

notes.react: Daily driver — currently at DBS (microfrontend webview), previously Bank Danamon, Doubler Studio.
notes.next: Landing pages + onboarding webview at Ajaib, a loan origination system at Infosys, client projects at Doubler Studio.
notes.svelte: Powers the federated remote you've been interacting with on this page.
notes.angular: Feature modules at Bank Danamon — DBankPro 2.0, Single-SPA → NX migration.
notes.vue: Exploring — planned as a second federated remote on this playground.
notes.javascript: Vanilla JS + jQuery on BCA projects at Doubler Studio — where it started.

liveRemote.description: This whole page is <react>React</react>. The component you'll fetch below is a separate <svelte>Svelte</svelte> app — a different framework, its own deployment — pulled over the network and mounted right here. That's Module Federation.

status.idle: idle · press Run to fetch the remote

offline.simulatedDescription: This is the fallback a visitor sees when a remote is unavailable. The host stays fully interactive — only this block degrades.
offline.devHint: The Svelte remote (naufal-lab) isn't running. In dev, start it with <code1>npm run dev:mf</code1> inside <code2>naufal-lab/</code2>.

summaries.dbs: A webview banking app built on React inside a Module Federation microfrontend — the same architecture this portfolio runs on.
summaries.ajaib: Migrated ajaib.co.id landing pages from WordPress to Next.js with SSR/SSG + SEO, and built a backend-driven webview form system for onboarding.
summaries.danamon: DBankPro 2.0 back office: a React container mounting Angular feature modules over Single-SPA, later migrated to NX — the exact cross-framework pattern this playground demonstrates.
summaries.infosys: Two features shipped into an ongoing Loan Origination System for Sarana Multi Infrastruktur (a state-owned infrastructure financier) — Next.js and Material UI, including a Syncfusion integration.
summaries.freelance: Kept building for BCA part-time while the Infosys and Danamon contracts ran — React and Next.js work, often as the sole developer.
summaries.doubler: Where it started: public-facing work for BCA, Indonesia's largest private bank — vanilla JS, jQuery and a Nunjucks + Gulp toolchain, often as the sole developer.

roles.geekgarden: GeekGarden (2022 – 23) — sole Flutter developer on two shipped client apps, Figma to QA-passed builds
roles.ehealth: Ehealth.co.id (2022 – 23) — Junior Software Engineer, Polymer UI on a healthcare product
roles.traveloka: Traveloka (2022) — Web Engineer intern: browser-automation research, web infra, UI-library components

experience.demoUnavailable: demo unavailable — try refreshing the page

commits.doubler: init: bca client projects, vanilla js + jquery

experience.promptLabel: Type a git command — try: git checkout danamon

quality.description: The whole system as a live map — the React host, the Svelte remote, the PartyKit presence server, and the Next.js blog, wired by how they actually talk. Click any app to read what it is, visit it, or open its latest test report.
quality.mapLabel: The four apps and how they connect, each with its test status

about.host: The React host you're on — it composes the federated remotes at runtime.
about.lab: The Svelte remote, federated into the host at runtime — and runnable on its own.
about.party: The PartyKit WebSocket server behind the multiplayer cursors — a realtime relay, no web page.
about.blog: The standalone Next.js content site — CV and posts, statically exported for SEO.

summary.role: Frontend & microfrontend engineer in Jakarta — I build interfaces and the architecture behind them.

chat.description: Ask about my work — this assistant is a few hundred lines of JavaScript, no LLM. Type a question or tap one below.
chat.disclaimer: No AI model — just algorithms over Naufal's real data.
chat.placeholder: Ask about his experience, stack, or availability…
chat.fallback: I'm not sure about that one — I'm a small algorithmic assistant. Try asking about Naufal's experience, tech stack, education, writing, or how to reach him:

answers.greeting: Hi! I'm Naufal's assistant — pure JavaScript, no AI model. Ask about his experience, stack, or how to reach him.
answers.about: Naufal Yusran is a frontend & microfrontend engineer based in {{location}}. Right now he's {{role}} at {{company}}, and he's shipped across {{count}} companies in banking, fintech, IT services, and agency work.
answers.experienceOverall: Naufal has worked across {{count}} companies (newest first):
answers.techNone: {{tech}} isn't in the highlighted roles — ask about his main stack instead.
answers.availability: Naufal is open to frontend / microfrontend roles. The best way to reach him is email ({{email}}) or LinkedIn.
answers.posts: Naufal writes about how this system is built. Latest:
answers.postsEmpty: No posts published yet — the first one is on the way. Check the blog.
answers.projects: A few things outside the day job:
answers.isThisAI: Nope — no LLM here. I'm a few hundred lines of hand-written JavaScript matching your question against Naufal's real data. The honesty is kind of the point on a frontend engineer's portfolio.
answers.help: Ask me about Naufal's experience (overall or at a specific company like DBS or Danamon), his tech stack, a tech he's used, his education, his writing, or how to hire him.
answers.blogDown: I can't reach the CV/blog data right now, so I can't answer that fully — but his CV has it. Try again in a moment.

presence.unavailable: Live cursors unavailable — try refreshing the page

themeDrawer.title: // theme
themeDrawer.description: Restyle the site live. One set of CSS variables on the host cascades across the Module Federation boundary — so a live Svelte remote re-skins with it, no remount.

canvas.hint: drag to pan · scroll or pinch to zoom

arch.title: why it's split
arch.body: State crosses the host↔remote boundary three ways, each more coupled than the last: cascade (theme · CSS vars) · contract (i18n · one string) · backend (presence · WebSocket).

hero.title: cursor repel
hero.body: Move your pointer across the name — each letter pushes away. Host-native React, no library.

chat.title: ask me anything
chat.body: A hand-built assistant — no LLM, just JavaScript matching your question to Naufal's real data.

techStack.title: icon orbit
techStack.body: A requestAnimationFrame loop spins the stack. Hover or tap a pill to pause it and read the note.

liveRemote.title: live federation
liveRemote.body: Run fires the real loadRemote('lab/SpringToy') — a Svelte app mounts inside this React host. Break the link to see the fallback.

experience.title: git terminal
experience.body: The career as a git graph. The prompt is a working shell — type checkout, diff, log, or help.

quality.title: the system, tested
quality.body: All four apps as a live map, wired by their real edges. Each node shows its latest test result and opens its full HTML report.
